description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender build, depicted in a dynamic walking pose. The figure's arms are slightly bent and positioned away from the torso, suggesting forward motion. The head is proportionate to the body, and the legs are extended in a stride, with one foot slightly ahead of the other. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, with no visible loose garments or accessories. The silhouette is clean and streamlined, with no extraneous details or objects carried. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian, suitable for placement in a variety of street or sidewalk environments.
description: A slender adult pedestrian in a walking pose, arms bent and legs striding, with a streamlined silhouette and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped arm position and forward stride, with the head and torso clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended stride and the profile of the bent arms, with the body leaning slightly forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the trailing leg, emphasizing the walking motion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alternate leg forward and the arm swing, with the body posture consistent with walking.
